<!-- this list is auto-generated by https://github.com/goreleaser/sponsors -->
{{- define "tier" -}}
{{- $label := index . "label" -}}
{{- $size := index . "size" -}}
{{- $sponsors := index . "sponsors" -}}
{{- if $sponsors }}
  <div class="goreleaser-sponsors-tier">
    <div class="goreleaser-sponsors-tier-label">{{ $label }}</div>
    <div class="goreleaser-sponsors-grid">
      {{- range $sponsors }}
        <a class="goreleaser-sponsor-item" 
          href="{{ .Website }}?utm_source=goreleaser&utm_medium=sponsor&utm_campaign=homepage&utm_content={{ .Source }}" 
          target="_blank" 
          rel="noopener sponsored"
        >
          <img 
            src="{{ .LogoWithSize $size }}" 
            alt="{{ .Name }}" 
            width="{{ $size }}" 
            height="{{ $size }}"
          />
          {{ .Name }}
        </a>
      {{- end }}
    </div>
  </div>
{{- end -}}
{{- end }}
<div class="goreleaser-sponsors-tiers">
{{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Diamond"  "size" 128 "sponsors" (index .ByTier "diamond"))  -}}
{{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Platinum" "size" 112 "sponsors" (index .ByTier "platinum")) -}}
{{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Gold"     "size" 96  "sponsors" (index .ByTier "gold"))     -}}
{{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Silver"   "size" 80  "sponsors" (index .ByTier "silver"))   -}}
{{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Bronze"   "size" 64  "sponsors" (index .ByTier "bronze"))   }}
</div>

{{- with index .ByTier "backer" }}

### Backers
{{- printf "\n" }}
{{- range . }}
- [{{ .Name }}]({{ .Website }}?utm_source=goreleaser&utm_medium=sponsor&utm_campaign=homepage&utm_content={{ .Source }})
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
